blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Created and assigned the `team` attribute to identify collector ownership
- Created and assigned the `service.name` attribute to identify which service the collector monitors
- Created and assigned the `env` attribute to identify the deployment environment
- Organized your fleet with attributes that enable remote configuration management

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey.

- [Monitor a Linux server in Grafana Cloud](/docs/learning-paths/linux-server-integration/)
- [Send logs to Grafana Cloud using Alloy](/docs/learning-paths/send-logs-alloy-loki/)
